get.summary: Fetches an envelope by id; exercises Any-bearing fields inside a component schema.
get.description: Fetches an envelope by id; exercises Any-bearing fields inside a component schema.

get.summary: Returns a binary blob via google.api.HttpBody.
get.description:
Returns a binary blob via google.api.HttpBody.  HttpBody itself becomes a
 component schema whose `extensions` field is `repeated google.protobuf.Any` —
 the regression that motivated the inline-WKT fix.

Envelope.description:
Carries a structural well-known type at every field position so the generated
 component schema exercises the inline-WKT code path for each one.

payload.description: Free-form payload — Any inlines to an open object.

attributes.description: Free-form attribute bag — Struct inlines to an open object.

annotation.description: Single JSON value of any type — Value inlines to the empty schema.

tags.description: Heterogeneous tag list — ListValue inlines to an unconstrained array.

updateMask.description: Update mask for partial updates — FieldMask inlines to a string.

acknowledgement.description: Sentinel "no payload" marker — Empty inlines to a strictly empty object.

contentType.description: The HTTP Content-Type header value specifying the content type of the body.

data.description: The HTTP request/response body as raw binary.

extensions.description:
Application specific response metadata. Must be set in the first response
 for streaming APIs.
